scripts.db:volume: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('docker volume create se_pgdata', { stdio: 'ignore' }); } catch(e) { process.exit(0); }"
scripts.db:up: pnpm run db:volume && node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('docker start se-pg', { stdio: 'ignore' }); } catch(e) { execSync('docker run -d --name se-pg -p 5432:5432 -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres -e POSTGRES_DB=station_eden_dev -v se_pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data postgres:16', { stdio: 'ignore' }); }"
scripts.db:wait: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); console.log('Waiting for PostgreSQL to start...'); let attempts = 0; const maxAttempts = 30; while (attempts < maxAttempts) { try { execSync('docker exec se-pg pg_isready -U postgres', { stdio: 'pipe' }); console.log('PostgreSQL is ready!'); process.exit(0); } catch(e) { attempts++; if (attempts >= maxAttempts) { console.error('PostgreSQL failed to start in time'); process.exit(1); } console.log('Waiting for PostgreSQL... attempt ' + attempts); require('child_process').execSync('timeout /t 2 /nobreak >nul 2>&1 || sleep 2', { stdio: 'ignore' }); } }"
scripts.db:down: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('docker stop se-pg', { stdio: 'ignore' }); } catch(e) { process.exit(0); }"
scripts.db:psql: docker exec -it se-pg psql -U postgres -d station_eden_dev
scripts.api:dev: pnpm exec dotenv -e apps/api/.env.local -- pnpm --filter @station-eden/api start:dev
scripts.migrate:dev: pnpm run db:up && pnpm run db:wait && pnpm exec dotenv -e apps/api/.env.local -- pnpm --filter @station-eden/api run migration:run
scripts.migrate:prod: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @station-eden/api run migration:run
scripts.dev: pnpm run migrate:dev && npm-run-all --parallel api:dev web:dev
scripts.dev:nocache: pnpm run migrate:dev && npm-run-all --parallel api:dev web:dev:nocache
scripts.prod:local: pnpm run migrate:prod && npm-run-all --parallel api:prod web:dev
scripts.prod:local:nocache: pnpm run migrate:prod && npm-run-all --parallel api:prod web:dev:nocache
scripts.clean: pnpm -r run clean && rimraf node_modules && pnpm store prune
